title: source-status
description: T6b refresh output: always current|changed|closed — never a bare skippable (W4). When status is changed, upstream_rev is required.

status.description: current = still the checked rev; changed = upstream moved (card demands accept); closed = cancelled path.

checked_rev.description: Rev this refresh checked against (digits under the r marker).

upstream_rev.description: Upstream rev when status is changed (the newer one).
